# Transcrição: 13-Tanner Smith

- **Fonte:** 13-Tanner Smith
- **Duração:** 01:16
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:16]

My name is Tanner Smith and I'm the CEO of Syndicate Marketing. We are a performance marketing agency and I am a total nerd of all things marketing, especially when it comes to paid ads. And the reason why is because I have seen personally in my life that knowing how to run paid ads has unlocked tons of opportunities, has helped me help more people, serve more people in my community and create impact and revenue for myself, my family and others. And the reality of the situation is, is that if you are not getting your product, program or service in front of your ideal customers, I believe you're doing them a disservice. You have impact, you have a mission, you have people to help. There are people right now in the world that have never heard of you, have no clue who you are, but could really benefit from what you have to teach or sell them. So I personally believe that the best way to tap into those people is through paid advertising and strategic digital marketing. I cannot wait to help you guys go from maybe a total beginner or an intermediate ad buyer to knowing how to set up and launch and create your own meta ad campaigns. I'll see you in the program.
